title: The Fisherman & The Fish
content:
Prayed the Fish, as the Fisherman took
    Him, a poor little mite, from his hook,
    "Let me go! I'm so small."
    He replied, "Not at all!
    You're the biggest, perhaps in the brook."

    A Little Certainty Is Better Than A Great Chance
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Fisherman & The Fish", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
